name: NyxQueen 4Wave Diode Laser (Rosegold)
shortDescription: The NyxQueen diode laser in elegant rosegold finish. 600W power, 4 wavelengths, 50 million shot lifespan. The same cutting-edge technology with a premium rosegold appearance.
description: The NyxQueen diode laser rosegold edition – the same professional-grade 600W power and 4-wavelength system in an elegant rosegold finish. A perfect choice for those who want to combine cutting-edge technology with a stylish appearance in their salon.
metaTitle: NyxQueen Diode Laser Rosegold | 600W, 4 wavelengths, 50M shots
metaDescription: NyxQueen 600W diode laser in rosegold finish. 4 wavelengths (755, 808, 940, 1064 nm), 50M shots, advanced cooling. 2-year warranty, free training.
